hausa.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: shi ne inda yawancin mutane ke farawa — yatsu suna huta a kan a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ;
hausa.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: . Font na dyslexia, alamun sauti, high-contrast, keyboard mai manyan maɓalli, da ƙari — su ne kayan aikin kansu, ba hanyar ajiye ba.
hausa.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Babu timer, babu tsere, babu hukunci na streak. Ka tafi a gudun ka. Ka tsaya duk lokacin da kake so.
hausa.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: — AI na rubuta rubutun atisaye a matakin ajin ka game da duk abin da kake so. Kunna
hausa.and_it_will_illustrate_what_you_type: zai kuma zana abin da kake bugawa.
hausa.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: na iya canzawa — jerin launuka a sama yana canzawa tsakanin theme 5. Ko ka danna
hausa.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Likita ko malami na iya sa burin IEP da fitar da ci gaba daga
hausa.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Kwanakin kalanda daban-daban da aƙalla session ɗaya cikin kwanaki 30 da suka wuce. Babu laifi don kwanakin hutu.
hausa.e_g_week_4_spelling_list_iep_sight_wor: misali, "Jerin spelling na mako 4", "Kalmomin gani na IEP"
hausa.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Ka buga ko ka manna rubutun. Haruffa na yau da kullum, lambobi, da alamomin rubutu na kowa suna aiki mafi kyau.
hausa.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — ba za a ajiye wannan session ba. Babu matsi, babu rikodi.
hausa.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Ko ka danna Space ko Enter don farawa. Ka danna Esc duk lokacin da kake cikin drill don fita.
hausa.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Rubutun da ba na Turanci ba suna amfani da ASCII kawai (babu accent / tilde) don maɓallan keyboard na yau da kullum su ci gaba da zama abin atisaye.
hausa.20_35_words_quick_focus: kalmomi 20-35 · mai da hankali da sauri
hausa.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: misali, sararin samaniya, karnuka, Minecraft, teku, hunturun Maine
hausa.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Tarin rubutun da aka rubuta da hannu waɗanda ke aiki ba tare da AI ba. Rubutun da aka shigo da su suna shiga library ɗin ka; rubutu iri ɗaya mako bayan mako shine tushen adalci ga yanayin IEP fiye da rubutun da aka sake samarwa.
hausa.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Rubutun da aka samar kwanan nan. Ka yi drill na kowanne don sake amfani. Mafi tsufa yana fita idan ka samar na 9.
hausa.no_text_loaded_for_this_drill: Babu rubutun da aka ɗora don wannan drill.
hausa.warmup_mode_session_will_not_be_saved: Warmup mode — ba za a ajiye session ba
hausa.pace_over_time_10_second_buckets: Gudu cikin lokaci · kwanduna na daƙiƙa 10
hausa.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Kowane sanda = haruffan da aka buga cikin taga na daƙiƙa 10. Ka sa kwamfuta a kai don ganin WPM kusan.
hausa.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Amsar ka tana taimaka wa malamai su ga lokacin da lambobi ba sa faɗin duk labarin.
hausa.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Yaya wannan session ya tafi? "Na fara a hankali, na ci gaba, na yi amfani da slow-motion mode..."
hausa.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: An ajiye bayani da wannan session. Zai bayyana a rahoton IEP da fitarwar CSV.
hausa.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Inganta hoton ƙarshe ta amfani da image-to-image maimakon farawa daga sifili
hausa.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Sauke wannan hoton a matsayin fayil na PNG
hausa.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Sake gwada rubutu iri ɗaya don doke makin ka
hausa.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Yana nuna cikakken rubutun na wannan daƙiƙai kafin bugawa ta fara. Yana taimaka wa ɗalibai da ke amfana daga karatu da farko, sannan samarwa. Ɗalibi na iya tsallake ƙidayar duk lokacin.
hausa.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Bayan wannan mintuna na bugawa mai aiki (lokacin tsayawa ba a ƙidaya ba), ka nuna tunatarwa mai laushi don yin hutu. Yana faruwa sau ɗaya kowane drill. An kashe shi ta asali.
hausa.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Canza duk kamannin kayan aikin. High-contrast mode yana rinjayar theme. Kawaii theme ne mai haske; sauran nau'ikan duhu ne.
hausa.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Canza launin haske da ake amfani da shi ga harafin yanzu, maɓallai, da mahimman matakai. Ga ɗalibai da ke ganin shuɗi sanyi ne sosai ko suna son launuka masu ɗumi don mai da hankali. High-contrast mode yana rinjayar wannan.
hausa.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Ka fi son gajeru ko dogayen rubutun drill. "Gajere" yana taimaka wa ɗalibai da matsalar hankali ko gajiya; "Dogo" na ɗalibai da ke gina jimrewa ne. Idan drill ba shi da sample da suka dace da zaɓin, yana komawa ga kowanne.
hausa.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Ɗigo mai bugawa a hankali a allon drill yana nuna kaɗe-kaɗe mai daidaito. BABU hukunci don tafiya a hankali — wannan tunani ne, ba ƙarshen lokaci ba. Yana taimakawa wajen tsara motsi. An kashe shi ta asali.
hausa.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Wannan sararin ka ne. Me ya sa kake atisaye? Menene burin ka na yau? Ya bambanta da burin IEP na likita.
hausa.why_i_m_practicing_shown_on_menu: Me ya sa nake atisaye (ana nunawa a menu)
hausa.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: misali, "Bugawa yana da wahala yanzu, amma zan iya rubuta labaraina na kaina." · "Ina son aika wa kakata email ba tare da mahaifiyata ta taimaka ba." · "Bugawa da sauri = ƙarancin lokacin aikin gida."
hausa.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Burin yau naka ne — ba a ƙidaya shi a kan ka ba idan ka rasa shi. Yana sake farawa kai tsaye gobe.
hausa.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Ka sa buri irin na IEP a nan. Yana bayyana a allon drill kuma yana cika rahoton ci gaba tun farko. Ana buƙatar shi kawai idan kana samar da bayanan ci gaba na hukuma.
hausa.e_g_j_d_initials_only_ferpa_safe: misali, J.D. (baƙaƙen farko kawai, mai aminci ga FERPA)
hausa.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Ka yi amfani da baƙaƙen farko ko sunan ƙarya — an tsara AlloFlow don ya kasance mai aminci ga FERPA.
hausa.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: misali, Ya fi son home-row da keyboard mai manyan maɓalli; a rage kurakurai kafin a ƙara gudu.
hausa.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Ajiye accommodations + burin IEP + theme na sauti zuwa JSON, ko ɗora profile daga wata na'ura. BA ya kwafin tarihin session ba — wannan yana zama ga kowane ɗalibi.
hausa.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Cikakken backup ya haɗa da session, mafi kyawun rikodi, ƙwarewa, taswirar kurakurai, da library biyu — duk rikodin ɗalibi. Ka yi amfani da wannan kafin ka share bayanan browser ko canza na'urori.
hausa.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Hanyar ci gaban ka na kanka. Babu kwatanta da abokai — wannan kai kaɗai ne, cikin lokaci.
hausa.week_vs_prior_week: Mako vs makon da ya gabata
hausa.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Yana shafar yanayi, rahoto, CSV. Itacen ƙwarewa yana zama na duk lokaci.
hausa.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Ƙara ko gyara bayani. Yana ajiyewa idan ka fita ko da Ctrl+Enter.
hausa.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Δ kore = inganta · ja = koma baya · toka = babu hukunci da aka yi amfani da shi (tsawon lokaci, adadin accommodations).
hausa.recommended_drill: 🎯 Drill da aka ba da shawara:
hausa.practice_calendar_last_30_days: Kalandar atisaye · kwanaki 30 da suka wuce
hausa.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Manyan maɓallan kuskure ta kowane drill · duk lokaci
hausa.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drill daban-daban suna fitar da rauni daban-daban. Ka yi amfani da wannan don zaɓar drill da ke nufin maɓallan matsala na musamman.
hausa.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Waɗannan suna murnar gwada accommodations — ba ɓoye su ba. Amfani da abin da ke taimakawa ƙarfi ne, ba rauni ba.
hausa.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: Matsakaicin WPM da kowane accommodation a kunne vs a kashe. Jimla a duk nau'ikan drill — haɗin drill na iya ruɗarwa, don haka ka yi amfani da rabewar kowane drill a rahoton ƙasa don manyan yanke shawara.
hausa.progress_report_iep_ready: Rahoton ci gaba (a shirye ga IEP)
hausa.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Danna rahoton don zaɓar duka, ko ka yi amfani da maɓallan ƙasa.
hausa.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Kwafi taƙaitaccen bayani na jimla 2-4 a harshe mai sauƙi don email na iyaye
hausa.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Kammala drill ɗin ka na farko don ganin tushen ka, yanayi, da rahoton IEP a nan.
hausa.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Babu session da ya dace da filter na yanzu.
hausa.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: Motsa tsakanin katin drill da maɓallan kewayawa
hausa.activate_the_focused_drill_card: Kunna katin drill da aka mai da hankali a kai
hausa.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Maimaita drill ɗin ka na ƙarshe (tsallake da sauri)
hausa.abandon_drill_progress_won_t_save: Bar drill (ba za a ajiye ci gaba ba)
hausa.on_any_screen_with_a_form: A kowane allon da ke da form
hausa.move_to_next_field_button: Motsa zuwa filin / maɓalli na gaba
hausa.activate_focused_button_context_depend: Kunna maɓallin da aka mai da hankali a kai (ya dogara da yanayi)
hausa.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Duk abin da ke cikin Atisayen Bugawa ana iya kaiwa da keyboard — an tsara haka ne don masu amfani da screen-reader da accommodations na tsara motsi.
hausa.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Maɓallan accommodations a allon gabatarwar drill ana iya kaiwa gaba ɗaya da keyboard ta Tab — babu buƙatar mouse ga kowane sashi na wannan kayan aikin.
hausa.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Yanayin wasa na zaɓi. Kalmomi suna hawa daga ƙasa; ka buga kalmar sama don ka share ta. Idan tarin ya kai rufi wasan ya ƙare. Babu leaderboard, babu laifin streak — mafi kyawun rikodi kawai.
hausa.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Kowane theme yana da mascot da ke bayyana a filin wasa, a menu, da a allon taƙaitawa. Suna amsawa ga abin da kake yi — combo, haɗari, hari, barci, nasara, rashi.
hausa.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Zaɓi kalmar hari don aika wa bot
hausa.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ HARI A SHIRYE — zaɓi kalma don aikawa
hausa.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Danna kati KO ka danna 1 / 2 / 3 don aikawa. Ka danna Esc don tsallakewa ba tare da aikawa ba. An daskare tarin ka yayin da kake zaɓi.
hausa.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ An dakatar — an daskare tarin biyu. Ka danna Ci gaba ko Esc don ci gaba.
hausa.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Gina tushe. A hankali + daidai yana doke sauri + rashin kula.
hausa.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Ci gaba mai daidaito. Kiyaye ƙasan daidaito.
hausa.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Gudu + daidaito cikin band mai amfani. Atisaye mai dorewa.
hausa.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: An kai WPM mai yawa. Riba tana raguwa daga gudu.
hausa.overreaching_accuracy_drops: ⚠️ Wuce gona da iri (daidaito yana faɗuwa)
hausa.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Gudu ya wuce kasafin daidaito. Koma zuwa buri mai jinkiri.
hausa.wpm_accuracy_tradeoff_discovery: ⚡ Gano ciniki tsakanin WPM da daidaito
hausa.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Slider biyar suna daidaita burin atisayen ka. Widget yana rarraba yankin ka cikin ɗaya daga cikin yanayi 5 daban kuma yana zana Pareto frontier na WPM-daidaito. Babu maki a kan daidaitawar ka — binciken yana cikin nemo wuraren atisaye masu dorewa.
hausa.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = mafi kyawun daidaito da za a iya samu a kowane WPM. Sama = ba na gaskiya ba; ƙasa = akwai sarari don girma.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Hasashe (rubutu kyauta): Menene burin ka mai dorewa? Ta yaya ƙasan daidaito ke canza WPM na gaskiya?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Ka sa WPM=80, daidaito=98. Na gaskiya ne? Ka kwatanta da alamar yankin ka.
hausa.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Ka sauke ƙasan daidaito zuwa 80%. Shin WPM na gaskiya yana hawa?
hausa.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Ƙwararru suna riƙe 95%+ a WPM 70+. Ka bincika waɗanne hanyoyin horo ke kaiwa can.
hausa.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Buri mai jinkiri da daidaito mai yawa na iya samar da ƙarin rubutu kowane session. Ka gwada.
hausa.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Na fahimci cinikin — ka bayyana da kalmomin ka
hausa.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Ka bayyana da kalmomin ka: ta yaya WPM, daidaito, da ƙarfin motsi ke haɗuwa? Menene Pareto frontier ke nufi ga atisayen bugawa?
hausa.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Bayanin tsari: alamar yankuna 5 daban; Pareto curve yana nuna sararin ciniki; babu buri "daidai" — an tsara haka.
